suite.name: Test Generated

kw.name: Connect To Test Database
Connect To Database
kw.msg: Connect to DB using : pymysql.connect(db='mydb', user='root', passwd=***, host='localhost', port=3306, charset='utf8mb4')
OperationalError: (2003, "Can't connect to MySQL server on 'localhost' ([WinError 10061] Aucune connexion n’a pu être établie car l’ordinateur cible l’a expressément refusée)")
kw.doc: Creates a database connection using the DB API 2.0 ``db_module`` and the parameters provided. Along with listed commonly used arguments (`db_name`, `db_host` etc.) you can set any other DB module specific parameters as key/value pairs.
